Repro: running `opencode run --model typo/claude-haiku-4-5` prints stack and hangs until SIGINT due to lingering watchers.

Notes: Prior attempt (#3083) explicitly exited; this approach addresses root cause without forcing exit and improves UX for common misconfigurations.

feat(cli): suggest closest provider/model on not found ("Did you mean…")

Summary
- Add fuzzy suggestions to ProviderModelNotFoundError with up to 3 candidates
- Normalize punctuation (e.g., 4.5 vs 4-5) and case to better match common typos
- Support model-only input (no provider) by searching across all providers
- Enhance CLI error formatter to display suggestions when present

Implementation
- provider.ts: use fuzzysort; add normalization by stripping non-alphanumerics; search by key for robust matches
- provider.ts: when provider is unknown and model is empty, treat token as unqualified model and search across all providers' models; otherwise suggest provider matches
- error.ts: print "Did you mean: <provider/model>, …" when suggestions exist
